title: 'Abel #0059
definition:
1) city in northern Israel near Bethmaachah
 2) the place where the ark rested in the field of Joshua at Bethshemesh
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) city in northern Israel near Bethmaachah
 2) the place where the ark rested in the field of Joshua at Bethshemesh

    NASB:  meadow, two places in Pal.
